analysis: The project appears to be a static website focused on black holes, with a dark, cosmic theme. The existing files include HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for the main page, as well as similar files for a GitHub page and a Vercel-hosted version. The theme should emphasize black holes with animated objects and slides, using a cosmic color palette and smooth transitions. The current CSS and JavaScript files need to be completed to fully implement the black hole theme, including animations and interactive elements.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with the full intended dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements.
Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.
Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented.
